decision_trail.summary: Core contributor outlined a five-pillar framework for agent wallets/identity, ownership, commerce, physical embodiment, reputation, and agentic governance and teased another experiment.
decision_trail.decision: Logged as catalyst/roadmap framing from a core contributor; watch for concrete experiment details.

decision_trail.decision: Not logged to changelog: useful governance context but no specific proposal/result, funding allocation, product change, or token impact in-window.
